name: openmed
description: Local-first healthcare AI: clinical NER & HIPAA PII de-identification that runs 100% on-device. 1,000+ medical models, 12 languages, Apple MLX + Python, no cloud, no patient data leaving your network. Apache-2.0
summaryZh: Local-first healthcare AI: clinical NER & HIPAA PII de-identification that runs 100% on-device. 1,000+ medical models, 12 languages, Apple MLX + Python, no cloud, no patient data leaving your network. Apache-2.0 这是偏模型能力或模型封装的项目，适合作为能力底座持续观察。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。
